tasks.label: GCC: Build Debug
tasks.command: mkdir -p ${workspaceFolder}/build/debug && cd ${workspaceFolder}/build/debug && conan build -b missing -s build_type=Debug ..

tasks.label: GCC: Build Release
tasks.command: mkdir -p ${workspaceFolder}/build/release && cd ${workspaceFolder}/build/release && conan build -b missing -s build_type=Release ..
